title: Layer: Switch layer on and off
description: As a network operations manager, I would like to switch individual layers on and off, for example to get an overview of other lines to my currently displayed domain.

steps.expectedResult: the layer is no more visible

steps.action: Open "User Information Menu" ( Button on the bottom right side of the app)
steps.expectedResult:
- Login Information is shown.
- Studio Web Version is shown
- VertiGIS Network App Version is shown
- Link to Shortcuts is shown

steps.action: Open "User Settings" via clicking on the icon "Show user settings" on the bottom right side of the app
steps.expectedResult: User Preferences are shown and could be changed by user.
UI changes according to the setting

steps.action: Hint: This setting will be saved for the user also when leaving and restarting the app.

steps.expectedResult: Legend is visible for visible Layers

steps.action: Deactivate visibility of a layergroup, e.g. Gas

steps.expectedResult: Legend for invisible Layers (e.g. Gas) is not shown
